flags.message: Decisive public forward signal used (legitimate, predates any disposition; disclosed for hygiene): the SG's CVSG response (filed 2026-05-26) recommends holding this petition for St. Mary Catholic Parish v. Roy, No. 25-581 (cert granted 2026-04-20, same Tenth Circuit Smith general-applicability issue). The prediction (P(grant incl. GVR)=0.72, modal disposition gvr) therefore expects resolution only after St. Mary is decided (~June 2027); this cell will stay open well past this run. Petition confirmed still pending as of 2026-07-17.
